name: l9-ci-debt
description: Deterministic editor diagnostics from immutable Quantum-L9 defense packs

commands.title: L9 CI Debt: Show Server Capabilities

l9CiDebt.server.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter used to launch the L9 CI Debt language server.

l9CiDebt.server.module.description: Python module containing the L9 CI Debt language server.

l9CiDebt.pack.activeVersion.description: Explicit immutable defense-pack version. Activation is implemented in LSP-P1.

l9CiDebt.telemetry.enabled.description: Enable minimized L9 telemetry after LSP-P5 is installed.
